8200-XREFFILE-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBSTM03A.CBL
Program: CBSTM03A
Paragraph: 8200-XREFFILE-OPEN (lines 765-782)
References: COPY COSTM01, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CUSTREC, COPY CVACT01Y
Calls: CALL CBSTM03B, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 8200-XREFFILE-OPEN in CBSTM03A.CBL. uses COPY refs: COSTM01, CVACT03Y, CUSTREC, CVACT01Y. invokes: CALL CBSTM03B, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
8200-XREFFILE-OPEN.
           MOVE 'XREFFILE' TO WS-M03B-DD.
           SET M03B-OPEN TO TRUE.
           MOVE ZERO TO WS-M03B-RC.
           CALL 'CBSTM03B' USING WS-M03B-AREA.

           IF WS-M03B-RC = '00' OR '04'
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING XREFFILE'
               DISPLAY 'RETURN CODE: ' WS-M03B-RC
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF.

           MOVE 'CUSTFILE' TO WS-FL-DD.
           GO TO 0000-START.
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y

results.summary: paragraph 0000-TRANFILE-OPEN in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0000-TRANFILE-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN INPUT TRANSACT-FILE                                             
           IF TRANFILE-STATUS = '00'                                            
              MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                             
           ELSE                                                                 
              MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           END-IF                                                               
           IF APPL-AOK                                                          
              CONTINUE                                                          
           ELSE                                                                 
              DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING TRANFILE'                                  
              MOVE TRANFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                 
              PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                    
              PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                        
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
